title: NarrativeElement
description: Represents a long-form narrative asset used for cover letters, leadership summaries, STAR stories, and interview preparation.

story_id.description: Unique identifier for this narrative element (UUID).

experience_id.description: Optional link to the experience entry this narrative belongs to.

theme_links.description: Cross-cutting themes reinforced by this narrative.

key_challenge.description: The central challenge or problem faced in this story.

key_win.description: The major success or outcome achieved.

lessons_learned.description: Insights or takeaways gained from the experience.

leadership_moment.description: A moment demonstrating leadership, influence, or decision-making.

transformation_story.description: A longer-form narrative describing a transformation, turnaround, or major initiative.

long_form_narrative.description: Full prose narrative used for cover letters, summaries, or interview prep.

related_achievements.description: Achievement IDs that support or relate to this narrative.

keywords.description: Keywords associated with this narrative for ATS and thematic matching.

relevance_weight.description: Weight used by the tailoring engine to prioritize this narrative.
